rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"details":"This library implements the Facet-Target-Repo pattern for the Balancer V3 Vault. Key differences from original VaultStorage.sol: 1. Uses Diamond storage pattern with slot-based layout 2. Replaces immutables with storage variables (initialized once) 3. Maintains exact storage layout compatibility for all state variables The original VaultStorage uses immutables for: - _MINIMUM_TRADE_AMOUNT, _MINIMUM_WRAP_AMOUNT (config) - _vaultPauseWindowEndTime, _vaultBufferPeriodEndTime, _vaultBufferPeriodDuration (timing) - Transient storage slot addresses (computed at deploy time) In Diamond pattern, we: - Store config values in regular storage (initialized once via _initialize) - Use constant transient slot computations (evaluated at compile time)","kind":"dev","methods":{},"stateVariables":{"ADD_LIQUIDITY_CALLED_SLOT":{"details":"Transient slot for add liquidity called flag. Domain: VaultStorage, Key: addLiquidityCalled"},"BUFFER_MINIMUM_TOTAL_SUPPLY":{"details":"Minimum BPT amount minted upon buffer initialization."},"IS_UNLOCKED_SLOT":{"details":"Transient slot for unlock state. Domain: VaultStorage, Key: isUnlocked"},"MAX_BUFFER_PERIOD_DURATION":{"details":"Maximum buffer period duration."},"MAX_PAUSE_WINDOW_DURATION":{"details":"Maximum pause window duration."},"MAX_TOKENS":{"details":"Maximum token count, implicitly hard-coded in PoolConfigLib through tokenDecimalDiffs packing."},"MAX_TOKEN_DECIMALS":{"details":"Maximum decimals supported. Tokens must implement IERC20Metadata.decimals."},"MIN_TOKENS":{"details":"Pools can have between two and eight tokens."},"NON_ZERO_DELTA_COUNT_SLOT":{"details":"Transient slot for non-zero delta count. Domain: VaultStorage, Key: nonZeroDeltaCount"},"POOL_MINIMUM_TOTAL_SUPPLY":{"details":"Minimum BPT amount minted upon pool initialization."},"SESSION_ID_SLOT":{"details":"Transient slot for session ID. Domain: VaultStorage, Key: sessionId"},"TOKEN_DELTAS_SLOT":{"details":"Transient slot for token deltas mapping. Domain: VaultStorage, Key: tokenDeltas"}},"title":"BalancerV3VaultStorageRepo","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Diamond-compatible storage layout for Balancer V3
